settings.name: B2bfiy
settings.defaultMetaDescription: B2bfiy helps businesses build a powerful digital presence through high-converting websites, professional graphic design, engaging video content, and complete social media management.

hero_content.heading: Build a Powerful Digital Presence That Helps Your Business Grow.
hero_content.trustText: One creative team for your complete digital presence.
hero_content.description: From high-converting websites and professional graphic design to engaging video content and complete social media management — B2bfiy gives your business the digital support it needs to stand out and grow.

services.title: Website Development
services.description: We build modern, fast, mobile-friendly websites designed to turn visitors into potential customers.

services.title: Graphic Design
services.description: Professional visual content that makes your brand look consistent, trustworthy, and memorable.

services.title: Video Editing
services.description: Engaging video content designed to capture attention and communicate your message effectively.

services.title: Social Media Management
services.description: We manage your social media presence so you can focus on running your business.

why_choose_us.title: One Team for Everything
why_choose_us.description: No need to hire separate freelancers. We handle your websites, graphics, videos, and social media under one roof.

why_choose_us.title: Custom Solutions
why_choose_us.description: We do not believe in boilerplate. Every design and campaign is custom-tailored to hit your specific business goals.

why_choose_us.title: Professional Quality
why_choose_us.description: Deliver premium standards with beautiful layouts, clean typography, engaging cuts, and solid responsive setups.

why_choose_us.title: Fast Communication
why_choose_us.description: Dedicated account coordinators ensure you are always in the loop via WhatsApp and email, responding in minutes.

why_choose_us.title: Affordable Packages
why_choose_us.description: Flexible and transparent agency packages customized specifically for growing startups and local businesses.

why_choose_us.title: Ongoing Growth Support
why_choose_us.description: We do not just hand over the assets. We constantly monitor performance, optimizing to scale up your leads and views.

portfolio_projects.title: HealthFirst Clinic Patient Portal
portfolio_projects.result: Clinic experienced a 45% increase in online appointment requests within the first 30 days of launch, cutting phone times in half.
portfolio_projects.process: 1. Wireframed clinic services grid. 2. Tailored UI with deep off-whites and clinical cyan-blue tints. 3. Hooked up client-side scheduling widget.
portfolio_projects.solution: Developed a ultra-fast, mobile-optimized Patient Booking website on React with automated appointment forms and clear services tables.
portfolio_projects.challenge: The clinic had an old slow website that was not responsive on mobile. Patients could not request appointments easily, resulting in hours of back-and-forth phone support.
portfolio_projects.description: A premium, highly secure patient registration and informational portal built to maximize client bookings.

portfolio_projects.title: BurgerNation Social Rebrand & Graphics
portfolio_projects.result: The rebranded posters generated 2.5x more comments and shares on Facebook and Instagram, boosting weekend takeaway traffic by 30%.
portfolio_projects.process: We developed custom branding textures and tailored photographic alignments to give their burgers an premium, mouth-watering editorial feel.
portfolio_projects.solution: Designed 15 highly stylized Instagram post templates and printable menus emphasizing high-contrast dark boards, dramatic golden smoke gradients, and punchy typography.
portfolio_projects.challenge: BurgerNation wanted a high-quality visual style that contrasted with standard generic restaurant posters, highlighting their gourmet wood-fired beef patties.
portfolio_projects.description: A complete culinary graphic rebranding and promotional menu design for social channels.

portfolio_projects.title: Fintech App Launch Promo Video
portfolio_projects.result: The launch video accumulated over 120,000 views on Facebook Reels in two weeks, contributing directly to 8,000 application installs.
portfolio_projects.process: 1. Drafted visual storyboard. 2. Recorded and edited mobile app screen flows. 3. Added professional motion graphics transitions, sound effects, and upbeat background music.
portfolio_projects.solution: Produced a fast-paced, high-energy 9:16 mobile format video containing dynamic text mockups, smooth UI transitions, and matching sound design.
portfolio_projects.challenge: CashFlow needed to introduce an easy peer-to-peer mobile transfer tool in a quick, eye-catching format suitable for TikTok, Reels, and YouTube Shorts.
portfolio_projects.description: An engaging 45-second animated and real-action smartphone app promotional video with custom typography.

portfolio_projects.title: Solaria Solar Energy Campaign
portfolio_projects.result: Monthly account organic reach skyrocketed by 210%, with over 35 direct inbound message inquiries asking for corporate quotes.
portfolio_projects.process: Created a structural matrix mixing system highlights, real client testimonials, cost calculators, and environmental benefits charts with professional copy writing.
portfolio_projects.solution: Implemented a 30-day educational content calendar highlighting cost savings of clean solar infrastructure, establishing credibility and authority.
portfolio_projects.challenge: Solaria had low digital presence, which hindered sales reps when calling business leaders who had never heard of their solar panels.
portfolio_projects.description: Complete monthly social media management comprising custom strategy, post layout, copy writing, and reporting.

work_process.title: Discovery
work_process.description: We start by deeply analyzing your business model, target market, competitors, and specific digital challenges.

work_process.title: Strategy
work_process.description: Our team crafts a precise, tailored growth plan outlining your content calendar, website blueprints, and video guidelines.

work_process.title: Create
work_process.description: Our professional designers, editors, and web developers design high-converting assets customized to make you look premium.

work_process.title: Launch
work_process.description: With full optimization in place, we launch your web platforms and push high-engaging visual campaigns to your target audience.

work_process.title: Support & Growth
work_process.description: We track monthly views and leads, continually refining layouts and plans to scale your online customer base.

testimonials.name: Kabir Ahmed
testimonials.review: B2bfiy totally transformed our business page. The social post designs and promotional videos are extremely professional, and our daily inquiries have doubled!

testimonials.name: Dr. Nusrat Jahan
testimonials.review: We are very happy with our clinic website designed by B2bfiy. It is fast, looks beautiful on phone screens, and lets patient book appointments with a click.

testimonials.name: Rashedul Islam
testimonials.review: The video editing packages are the best deal we have ever found. They handle everything from trending audio to kinetic captions, making our reels viral!

faqs.answer: Our project costs depend on your requirements. We offer competitive individual and monthly packages for graphic design (starting from ৳5,000), video editing (from ৳6,000), websites (from ৳15,000), and full-scale social management (from ৳12,000/month). For complex portals, we provide custom quotes.
faqs.question: How much does a project cost?

faqs.answer: A basic landing page or starter website takes 7 to 10 business days. Premium business portals typically take 10 to 20 days, and large custom e-commerce or portal builds require 20 to 30 days.
faqs.question: How long does website development take?

faqs.answer: Yes! We support businesses both locally in Bangladesh and internationally, organizing requirements seamlessly over WhatsApp, Zoom, and email.
faqs.question: Do you work with international clients?

faqs.answer: Absolutely. If our main plans do not match your exact needs, tell us what you want via the Contact form or a Free Audit request, and we will tailor a special plan for you.
faqs.question: Can I request a custom package?

faqs.answer: Yes, we provide 30 to 60 days of post-launch maintenance for websites. Our monthly management clients get continuous 24/7 dedicated creative support on WhatsApp.
faqs.question: Do you provide ongoing support?

faqs.answer: You can get started instantly by applying for our Free Digital Audit, filling out our contact form, or clicking the WhatsApp button to chat directly with our coordinators!
faqs.question: How do I get started?
